item.title: Israel Joffe and Michael Hayes attend LOVE FOR LARISSA – Kenny Kenny… News Photo – Getty Images
item.description: https://www.gettyimages.ca/detail/news-photo/israel-joffe-and-michael-hayes-attend-love-for-larissa-news-photo/818566634 Fun times at a great event! Israel Joffe and Michael Hayes attend(s) LOVE FOR LARISSA - Kenny Kenny & Joey Israel present: AMANDA LEPORE'S BIG TOP @ CARNIVAL at 110 University Place on August 4th, 2010 in New York City. (Photo by Scott Morgan/Patrick McMullan via Getty Images)
